title: Supply Chain Manager - Dunzo Logistics - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Dunzo Logistics - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Dunzo Logistics! We are hiring a Supply Chain Manager for our Pimpri-Chinchwad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Dunzo Logistics:
Dunzo Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dunzo Logistics!
